YOU MUST BUILD TRUST-BY LISTENING TO EVERY MEMBER-THIS CREATES A SAFE SPACE-WHERE PEOPLE FEEL VALUED-AND UNDERSTOOD-BY THE LEADER-
TRUST IS THE FOUNDATION-OF ANY STRONG COMMUNITY-IT TAKES TIME-BUT THE REWARDS ARE HUGE-WHEN MEMBERS KNOW THEY ARE SAFE-TO SHARE THEIR HEARTS-
###
###
**NURTURING RELATIONSHIPS**
ENCOURAGE SMALL GROUPS-TO FOSTER DEEP BONDS-AMONG MEMBERS-THIS HELPS THEM GROW-TOGETHER IN FAITH-AND SUPPORT ONE ANOTHER-
PLAN REGULAR GATHERINGS-TO STRENGTHEN TIES-THROUGH SHARED MEALS-AND WORSHIP-THIS CREATES LASTING MEMORIES-THAT BIND THE GROUP-
###
**EMPOWERING LEADERSHIP**
IDENTIFY TALENTED INDIVIDUALS-TO TAKE ON ROLES-THIS DISTRIBUTES THE WORKLOAD-AND GIVES MORE VOICE-TO THE COMMUNITY-
TRAIN THESE LEADERS-WITH PATIENCE AND PRAYER-SO THEY CAN SERVE-WELL AND GROW-THROUGH THEIR EXPERIENCE-THIS SUSTAINS THE MISSION-FOR GENERATIONS TO COME-
